name: boilerplate-custom-theme
description: Custom WordPress theme boilerplate with Tailwind CSS and custom Gutenberg blocks

scripts.build:admin: for dir in src/admin/*/; do [ -f "${dir}index.js" ] && wp-scripts build ${dir}index.js --output-path=build/admin/$(basename $dir); done
scripts.build:editor: for dir in src/editor/*/; do [ -f "${dir}index.js" ] && wp-scripts build ${dir}index.js --output-path=build/editor/$(basename $dir); done
scripts.start:admin: for dir in src/admin/*/; do [ -f "${dir}index.js" ] && wp-scripts start ${dir}index.js --output-path=build/admin/$(basename $dir) & done; wait
scripts.start:editor: for dir in src/editor/*/; do [ -f "${dir}index.js" ] && wp-scripts start ${dir}index.js --output-path=build/editor/$(basename $dir) & done; wait
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:blocks && npm run build:admin && npm run build:editor
scripts.start: npm run watch:css & npm run start:blocks & npm run start:admin & npm run start:editor

author: Loc Nguyen
